title: Outdoor Low Angle Interactive Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Outdoor Low Angle Interactive Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-quality vertical 4:5 realistic outdoor portrait themed around summer campus flower-path interaction portrait, featuring adult young woman with clear natural features and bright expressive eyes. Subject: adult young woman with clear natural features and bright expressive eyes has sweet, lively, gentle, slightly playful confidence, natural facial detail, real skin texture, expressive eye contact, and wears white eyelet blouse with pale blue pleated skirt, ribbon waist detail, and layered fabric texture with small pearl hair clip, slim bracelet, and light canvas shoulder bag. Scene: sunny outdoor campus walkway beside hydrangea bushes with fixed source composition, crop, hierarchy, and layout rule from the prompt creating believable outdoor air, natural spatial depth, and seasonal atmosphere. Composition: Fixed close slightly-low waist-height phone-camera perspective, with the adult subject leaning naturally toward the lens, hands participating in the pose, face near the upper frame, and clothing layers readable with clean editorial framing. Signature Elements: Slightly low near-camera portrait angle, subject leaning toward the lens, direct expressive eye contact, hands integrated into the pose, readable outfit layers and accessories, natural outdoor depth, summer air, soft foreground framing, and clean realistic photography finish. Fixed source details: Lighting Time: soft late-afternoon summer light; Background Elements: blue sky, tree shadows, flower clusters, campus building edges, and a few soft foreground leaves. Style: Realistic high-quality outdoor portrait photography with clean natural color, summer air, believable hair movement, fabric texture, lively expression, and refined editorial restraint. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: white eyelet blouse with pale blue pleated skirt, ribbon waist detail, and layered fabric texture should show real fabric texture, folds, lace, ties, embroidery, and layered hem detail; accessories and hair remain stable and clear. Restrictions: Keep an adult subject, tasteful close portrait framing, natural body proportions, stable hands and accessories, realistic skin texture, clear facial detail, coherent outdoor background, controlled exposure, and polished photographic quality.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
